title: The Four Seasons – Summer, III. Presto

midi_file.note_on_key: MIDI metadata says C; piece is in G minor

musical_notes.character: Presto — violent summer storm, rapid repeated-note tremolo figures and scalar runs

sections.name: Opening storm theme
sections.description: Tremolo on open G/D strings alternating with melodic fragments; characteristic repeated-note figures

sections.name: Solo violin passages
sections.description: Rapid ascending/descending scale runs, arpeggios reaching up to A6 (MIDI 93)

dynamics.note: This MIDI has flat velocity (90) throughout — no dynamic variation encoded. Written dynamics in the score include f, ff, and p for echo passages.
